user_message: Just got this from Sandra Taylor at Northwind Traders -- I need help figuring out whitespace analysis. Renewal conversation is tomorrow.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-12 08:05 EST
Subject: Re: Re: whitespace analysis Timeline

Just checking in on the whitespace analysis proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Date: 2024-02-06 10:01 EST
Subject: Re: whitespace analysis Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the whitespace analysis proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-03 08:17 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Northwind Traders whitespace analysis

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with whitespace analysis. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Northwind Traders: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF42-N trap (Opportunity creation requires approval ceremony when CSA can self-validate from ); produces complete Signal assessment, opportunity hypothesis with confidence, ownership routing, response draft, next-s
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF42-N failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF42-N failure mode (Opportunity creation requires approval ceremony when CSA can self-validate from )
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct whitespace analysis decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF42-N -- Opportunity creation requires approval ceremony when CSA can self-validate from
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
